name: Wordle
title: Wordle | Weekly Arcade - Free Daily Word Game
description: Play Wordle free online. Guess words from 3-7 letters with progressive difficulty. A new word every day! No download required.
keywords: wordle, word game, puzzle game, daily word game, free wordle, browser game, guess the word
tips: Start with a word that has common vowels like RAISE or ADIEU to eliminate letters quickly
Never reuse gray letters — the keyboard highlights which letters are eliminated
If you get a yellow letter, try it in a different position on your next guess
Save hard consonants (X, Z, Q) for later guesses when you have more information
On higher levels (6-7 letters), focus on common word patterns and suffixes like -TION or -MENT
howToPlay: Type a word matching the required letter count and press Enter. Green means correct letter in correct position. Yellow means correct letter in wrong position. Gray means the letter is not in the word. You have 6 attempts to guess the word.
aboutGame: Wordle is a free daily word puzzle game where you guess a hidden word in 6 attempts. Each guess reveals which letters are correct (green), misplaced (yellow), or absent (gray). Weekly Arcade's version features progressive difficulty from 3 to 7 letters, streak tracking, and global leaderboards. A new word is generated every day, making it the perfect daily brain exercise.

faq.a: Yes. Wordle on Weekly Arcade is 100% free with no ads, no downloads, and no account required. You can play as a guest instantly.

faq.q: How many Wordle puzzles are there per day?
faq.a: One new word is generated each day. You can also replay at different word lengths (3-7 letters) for additional challenge and to build your streak.
Yes. Wordle is fully responsive with touch-friendly controls and works on any phone, tablet, or desktop browser without downloading an app.
